Read `AGENTS.md` first.
Read `ai/README.md`.
Use `ai/` as the source of truth.
Read `ai/contracts/`.

A task must start with the appropriate contract.
Stop if task, workflow, scope, forbidden actions, backward-compatibility position, scientific boundaries, test plan, definition of done, audit checklist, or final report format are missing.
Do not duplicate full contract content here.
No backward compatibility by default.
Do not perform release, tag, or versioning work.
Final response must follow `AGENTS.md`.
